name: Mace of the Pumpkin Effigy
description: Notes This is a unique mace that is closer to a Trickster’s prism than most maces. Not only is the stationary summon spawned on the player’s position, but it acts as a decoy. It works exactly like the ST prism Brain of the Golem, but with the addition of damage.
effects: Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles Shots boomerang
